title: oncostylus involucratus
intro: Oncostylus involucratus, also known as the Chinese Angelica or Dang Gui, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anticoagulant effects. The health benefits of Oncostylus involucratus include reducing menstrual cramps and pain, improving blood circulation, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
